title: Income Tax Department Updates: Important Deadlines for April 2026 & Beyond
content:
# Income Tax Department Updates: Important Deadlines for April 2026 & Beyond

Ek important update hai! Government ne Income Tax Act, 2025 aur Income Tax Rules, 2026 ke operational hone ke saath kuch key deadlines clarify aur announce kiye hain, effective April 1, 2026. The Income Tax Department ki official website bhi April 16, 2026 ko last review aur update ki gayi hai.

**Key Updates aur Deadlines:**

*   **New Income Tax Regime:** The Income-tax Act, 2025, has come into force from April 1, 2026, replacing the previous Income-tax Act, 1961. Iske saath hi, Income-tax Rules, 2026 bhi notify kar diye gaye hain jo naye procedural framework ko establish karte hain.
*   **Revised ITR Filing Due Dates for AY 2026-27 (FY 2025-26) under New Rules:**
    *   **For Individuals (non-audit cases) filing ITR-1 & ITR-2:** The new due date for filing Income Tax Return is July 31, 2026.
    *   **For Individuals (non-audit cases) filing ITR-3 & ITR-4:** The new due date for filing Income Tax Return has been extended to August 31, 2026.
    *   **For Taxpayers requiring Audit:** The due date for filing Income Tax Return is October 31, 2026.
    *   **For Transfer Pricing Cases:** The due date for filing returns is November 30, 2026.
*   **Important Compliance Deadlines in April 2026:**
    *   **April 30, 2026:** Due date for depositing Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) by assessees other than government for the month of March 2026.
    *   **April 30, 2026:** Due date for depositing TDS for the period January 2026 to March 2026, for assessees permitted for quarterly deposit.
    *   **April 30, 2026:** Due date for intimation by a Pension Fund of investment under clause (23FE) of section 10 (Form 10BBB) for the quarter ending March 31, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://incometax.gov.in/)

*Published on: 17 April 2026*
